summary: Completed frontend testing of Sahib Design Language Editor. All core features are working correctly.

issues: Clicking sidebar nav items updates the editor panel correctly but there is no data-testid on the section title heading to easily verify which section is active via automation

critical_code_review_comments: Reset button uses native window.confirm() - works fine but note it cannot be tested with standard Playwright automation (dismissed automatically)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pure frontend app with localStorage. All 10 nav sections working. RTL layout confirmed (sidebar on right x=1680, preview on left x=0, editor in center x=380). All export buttons (.css, .json, .md) trigger downloads. Save button shows Arabic feedback. PROTECTED badge visible. Theme toggle works. Brand section shows orange swatch #DE7E5F.

test_results.rtl_layout: PASS - sidebar x=1680 (right), editor x=380 (center), preview x=0 (left)
test_results.sidebar_navigation: PASS - all 10 sections clickable with data-testids nav-brand through nav-layout
test_results.editor_updates_on_nav: PASS - editor panel updates when clicking different sections
test_results.theme_toggle: PASS - bg changes from rgb(13,18,21) dark to rgb(240,242,245) light
test_results.save_button: PASS - shows 'تم الحفظ!' feedback, saves to localStorage
test_results.reset_button: PASS - button renders and shows window.confirm dialog
test_results.preview_panel: PASS - shows colors, typography, buttons, spacing, radius, shadows, card sample
test_results.arabic_text: PASS - Arabic text throughout, including صاحب branding
test_results.ds_badge: PASS - DS badge with orange background in sidebar header
